description_long: This mobile phone features a sleek, rectangular design with rounded corners and a slightly raised camera module on the back. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with a modern abstract wallpaper in shades of blue and white, and the word 'SHIVU' faintly visible. The back panel is a matte dark gray with a vertical strip and the 'SHIVU' branding, as well as a dual-lens camera module housed in an oval bump at the top. The sides are slim and metallic, with a single button visible on the left edge, likely for power or volume control. The device appears to be constructed primarily from metal and glass, giving it a premium and durable feel. Its overall proportions and features are consistent with contemporary smartphones designed for urban use.
description: A modern, rectangular mobile phone with a large display, dual rear cameras, and 'SHIVU' branding on a matte gray back. The device has a sleek, metallic frame and a raised camera bump.
description_view_0: The left edge of the phone, showing its slim profile and a single button near the top.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying the large screen with an abstract blue-and-white wallpaper and faint 'SHIVU' branding.
description_view_2: The right edge of the phone, highlighting the thinness and absence of visible buttons.
description_view_3: The back view, featuring a matte gray finish, a vertical 'SHIVU' logo, and a dual-lens camera module in an oval bump at the top.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'SHIVU' appears in white, vertically oriented on the lower left of the back panel and faintly on the front display wallpaper.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen shows an abstract blue-and-white wallpaper with the word 'SHIVU' faintly visible in the center; no icons, widgets, or notifications are present.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses arranged horizontally within an oval bump located at the top center of the back panel.
attribute_button_layout: A single elongated button is visible on the left edge, likely serving as a power or volume button.
